headline: JPMorgan says large-cap biotech is back as profits and pipelines fuel upside
summary: Investing.com -- J.P. Morgan has reinstated coverage on 14 large-cap biotechnology companies, arguing the sector is entering a major inflection point as pipeline successes increasingly translate into profitable and diversified commercial businesses.

raw.headline: JPMorgan says large-cap biotech is back as profits and pipelines fuel upside
raw.summary: Investing.com -- J.P. Morgan has reinstated coverage on 14 large-cap biotechnology companies, arguing the sector is entering a major inflection point as pipeline successes increasingly translate into profitable and diversified commercial businesses.

headline: These 2 Cheap Biotech Stocks Offer Potential for Low-Beta Growth
summary: If you’re looking to diversify outside of AI, especially as AI investors look to trim their winners to save up for that mega-cap AI IPO boom on the horizon, with SpaceX leading the way, the biotech space is more than worth exploring, especially as some of the AI benefits start to trickle downstream towards biotech ... These 2 Cheap Biotech Stocks Offer Potential for Low-Beta Growth

headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:VRTX): Strong Growth Meets a Technical Setup for a Potential Breakout
summary: Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) combines strong fundamental growth with a promising technical setup, featuring a 7/10 setup rating and zero debt for a potential breakout opportunity.

headline: Vertex’s Jounavx made history, but still left a void in the pain space
summary: The search is still on for an opioid alternative and many companies are betting on ion channel drugs to fill the gap.
